business_description.nature_of_business: Commercial real estate/property holdings with office, mercantile, and mixed-use properties

positives: Portfolio is primarily fire resistive, masonry non-combustible, or non-combustible construction.
Buildings are relatively modern, with years built ranging from 1995 to 2018.
concerns: All scheduled locations are concentrated in Texas.
Prior-year modifications indicate an added warehouse facility effective 2026-03-15.
Prior-year modifications also indicate a location closure due to lease expiration effective 2026-03-15.

extracted_text_sections.executive_summary: Changes from Prior Year: Addition - New Location - Added warehouse facility; Deletion - Old Location - Lease expired, location closed; Update - Lone Star Property Holdings, LP - Updated TIV per appraisal.
